subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Most Great Name that was hidden in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه هو الاسم الاعظم و کان مکنونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @belief and denial, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Greatest Name
